label: via best lexeme lemma (P9970)
summary: New composition: clone of Z33677 'via best lexeme lemma' with the hardcoded predicate constant swapped from P5137 to P9970. Returns the lemma of the best-ranked lexeme linked to the input item via P9970 in the given language and lexical category.

composition.name: lemma string from lexeme and lang

Z21806K1.label: lexeme
Z21806K1.name: best lexeme with category from Wikidata item
